patterns.name: Crypto/Investment Pump
patterns.description: Detects urgency + scarcity + social proof appearing together in crypto/investment context

patterns.name: Phishing Lure
patterns.description: Detects authority + urgency + fear appeal combined with action demands

patterns.name: Health Misinformation
patterns.description: Detects authority + fear appeal + false dilemma in health/medical context

patterns.name: Romance Scam
patterns.description: Detects emotional manipulation + reciprocity + urgency in personal/financial context

patterns.name: Get-Rich-Quick Scheme
patterns.description: Detects authority + social proof + anchoring + urgency in financial context

patterns.name: Fear-Based Conversion
patterns.description: Detects fear appeal + scarcity + false dilemma designed to force immediate action
